name: Christ Community Chapel Aurora
description: Christ Community Chapel Aurora is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Aurora, OH. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Garrettsville Craig Moser Park
description: Garrettsville Craig Moser Park is a place to play pickleball in Garrettsville, OH. There are 3 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. Amenities include restrooms.

name: Garrettsville Family YMCA
description: Garrettsville Family YMCA is a place to play pickleball in Garrettsville, OH. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water.

name: Streetsboro City Park
description: Streetsboro City Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Streetsboro, OH. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free.

name: Western Reserve Racquet and Fitness Club
description: Western Reserve Racquet and Fitness Club is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Streetsboro, OH. There are 20 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include a pro shop or equipment store, restrooms, water, lights, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, adaptive programming, locker rooms, and food. A one-time fee is required to play.
